fields.title: [session-api] Fix: Resolve session workspace relative to tool execution
[session-api] Fix: Resolve session workspace relative to tool execution

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Session store root is resolved dynamically based on tool execution context. 2. Running from repository root correctly writes to the active workspace's .memory-api directory. 3. Workspace resolution is robust across Windows, WSL, and Linux. 4. Focused tests verify resolved store root matches expected workspace layout.
